factor values (sorted): 1.897, 1.897, 1.897, 1.897, 1.897
The median factor is 1.897.

Converting 41.64:
41.64 * 1.897:
41.64 * 0.007 = 0.29148
41.64 * 0.090 = 3.74760
41.64 * 0.800 = 33.31200
41.64 * 1.000 = 41.64000
0.29148 + 3.74760 = 4.03908
4.03908 + 33.31200 = 37.35108
37.35108 + 41.64000 = 78.99108
= 78.991

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{78.991}
